title: Add official guidelines for Medication Review Pharmacy and Individual Confirmation
description: Write and validate official rubric guidelines for Medication Review: Pharmacy and Medication Review: Individual Confirmation so RCA no longer flags guideline gaps or empty-guideline ambiguity on those split scores.
